description: AI-powered presentation builder — describe any topic, Claude generates a complete slide deck. Fullscreen present mode, keyboard navigation, export as single self-contained HTML file. Household seed prompts pre-loaded.
features: 7 slide layouts: title, bullets, content, two-col, quote, code, closing
6 household seed prompts (Agent Household, ClawDash Architecture, Podda Pitch, etc.)
Fullscreen present mode with keyboard navigation
Export as single self-contained HTML file
API key stored in localStorage — no backend required
